user_goal: B026 Synthetic Data Banner — 在 workbench Layer 0 期间所有 protected 页面顶部加持久 banner，明确但克制地标注 'Research prototype · Synthetic data only · Not for investment decisions / 研究原型 · 仅含合成数据 · 不构成投资决策依据'，防止用户误把 synthetic 数字当作真实投资依据。Stream 0 / Phase 0 (implementation-path-2026-05.md §4 第一个 batch，独立可立即做无前置依赖)。本批次 2 features：(F001) SyntheticDataBanner 组件 + protected layout 集成 + 新 namespace syntheticBanner.{headline,ariaClose} 双语 messages + env flag NEXT_PUBLIC_SYNTHETIC_DATA_BANNER 控制 + 本会话隐藏 reload 重现 + vitest ≥6 + Playwright ≥4 双 locale；(F002) Codex L1+L2 真 VM 验收 + signoff + framework 候选记录。**永久硬边界 100% 继承 v0.9.28：** AI 5 子条 + 系统层 + UI 层 + 数据 CI 层 + 产品边界。决策矩阵（2026-05-25 用户已批）：本会话隐藏可关闭性 / env var 手动控制 Layer 状态 / 明确但克制文案语气 / 浅黄背景 + Info 图标 / 仅 protected 路径 / 双语继承 B024 i18n。Phase 1 Real Data done 阶段 by acceptance 修改 .env.production NEXT_PUBLIC_SYNTHETIC_DATA_BANNER=false 让 banner 自然下线。F001 generator，F002 codex。预估 1 个轻量批次（参考 Phase 0 lead-in 定位）。
evaluator_feedback: 2026-05-25 B026 F002 first-round verification failed at L1. Production `/api/health.version` already matches current HEAD `c9274b5ba18146e132de5a5061556d020af73066`, so deploy drift is not the issue. Green gates: backend pytest 241+2 skipped / ruff / mypy, trade pytest 727 / mypy, frontend lint / typecheck / vitest 165 / npm audit, artifact grep clean, Playwright inventory = 38 tests. Hard blockers: (1) `cd workbench/frontend && npm run build` fails during page-data collection with `PageNotFoundError: Cannot find module for page: /execution/journal-history` and `/execution/position-diff`, despite the corresponding `src/app/(protected)/execution/.../page.tsx` files existing. (2) `NEXTAUTH_SECRET=codex-local-test-secret ALLOWED_USER_EMAIL=codex@example.com npx playwright test` collapses broadly because pages render `Internal Server Error`: `/login` anonymous disclaimer spec fails, `/ -> /login` fails, protected-route shell tests fail, and the new B026 banner tests fail because the page body is already broken. Report: docs/test-reports/B026-synthetic-data-banner-blocker-2026-05-25.md. Status must return to fixing; L2 not run.
generator_handoff: B026 F001 fix-round 1 — Codex blockers NON-REPRODUCIBLE in three environments (Generator local clean build, GitHub Actions Workbench Frontend CI on c9274b5, Workbench Deploy on c9274b5). Production HEAD == main HEAD == c9274b5 confirmed. Local re-runs on c9274b5: `rm -rf .next && npm run build` green (full 18-route table including /execution/journal-history 3.47kB + /execution/position-diff 3.09kB, no PageNotFoundError); `curl http://127.0.0.1:3000/login` returns 200 with full HTML (NextIntlClientProvider + locale zh-CN), NOT `Internal Server Error`; `npx playwright test e2e/b026-synthetic-banner.spec.ts` 6/6 passed (setup + 5 B026 specs zh-CN + en). No B026 F001 code touches /execution/journal-history or /execution/position-diff (last modified 2026-05-22, before this batch). messages JSON parses cleanly, namespace populated. Three environments green disagreeing with one Codex local strongly indicates Codex-side env issue (stale .next, stale dev server on :3000, or missing platform native bin from @next/swc-*/lightningcss-*). Full evidence + suggested re-verify steps (rm -rf .next node_modules; npm ci; npx playwright install chromium; npm run build) in docs/test-reports/B026-synthetic-data-banner-generator-response-2026-05-26.md. No production code modified this round. Status pushed to reverifying for Codex to retry with clean env. If Codex reproduces after the suggested reset, please attach next build stderr + node/npm/uname + node_modules/@next/swc-* directory listing so Generator can land a platform-specific defensive change.

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-25 B026 启动（implementation-path-2026-05.md §4 Phase 0 第一个 batch，独立可立即做）。(1) 用户在 B025 done 阶段完成 5 份产品规划 docs + implementation-path 接续地图 + framework v0.9.28 沉淀（结构澄清 + AI 边界精细化 5 子条）。用户说'按路线依次安排批次'，按 harness 状态机一次一批次启动 B026。(2) 用户确认 3 关键决策：本会话隐藏可关闭性（点 × 后会话级 React state 隐藏 / reload 后重现）/ env var 手动控制 Layer 状态（NEXT_PUBLIC_SYNTHETIC_DATA_BANNER，Phase 1 done 时手动改 false）/ 明确但克制文案语气（'研究原型 · 仅含合成数据 · 不构成投资决策依据' / 'Research prototype · Synthetic data only · Not for investment decisions'，浅黄背景 + Info 图标，不走红色 WARNING）。(3) Spec 落地 docs/specs/B026-synthetic-data-banner-spec.md 含 11 章节，引用 implementation-path §4 §7 §8 §9 / positioning §1.1 §6.1 / user-personas §7 §8 / B024 §4 i18n / framework/STRUCTURE.md / planner.md AI 边界 / generator.md §15 / templates/signoff-report.md（v0.9.27 §Post-signoff Deploy）。(4) features.json + progress.json 同步更新；backlog.json 不动（B026-B043 序列在 implementation-path 中固化，不入 backlog；backlog 仅保留 BL-XXX 风格的 signoff soft-watch 条目）。(5) status: done → building（混合批次：F001 generator + F002 codex，跳过 new/planning 直接 building）。(6) 下一会话 Generator (默认映射 Claude CLI，无 .agent-id) 起 F001：SyntheticDataBanner 组件 + protected layout 集成 + 新 namespace 双语 messages + vitest ≥6 + Playwright ≥4。关键注意点：① 不动 B024 既有 16 namespace 仅新增 1 个 syntheticBanner.*；② Layout 集成只入 (protected) 不入 root / login；③ env flag check at component level (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SYNTHETIC_DATA_BANNER !== 'false' 默认 true)；④ Dismiss state local React state，不入 cookie / localStorage（本会话隐藏 reload 重现）；⑤ Playwright 双 locale × 5 protected 路由抽样 ≥3 / dismiss reload 重现；⑥ 中文按钮禁词 vitest grep 0 命中（新 banner 文案不含禁词）；⑦ Backend 不动 既有 pytest ≥320 不破；⑧ Phase 1 done by acceptance 修改 .env.production 隐藏 banner 是后续 batch 责任不在本批次。(7) 后续路径按 implementation-path §4 顺序：B027 (S1.A 数据源选型 + B009 snapshot 增强) → B028 (S1.B 价格 backfill) → B029 (S1.C 财务 SEC EDGAR) → B030 (S1.D 全 sleeve 切真) → 里程碑 A Layer 0→1。
session_notes.generator: 2026-05-26 F001 fix-round 1 — Codex blocker 不可复现，无代码修改。调查路径：(a) 本地 `rm -rf .next && npm run build` 在 c9274b5 全绿（Node 25.7.0 npm 10.8.2），完整 18 路由表含 /execution/journal-history (3.47kB) + /execution/position-diff (3.09kB)，无任何 PageNotFoundError；(b) 本地 `curl http://127.0.0.1:3000/login` 返回 200 OK + 合法 HTML（包含 NextIntlClientProvider，无 Internal Server Error）；(c) `NEXTAUTH_SECRET=local-test ALLOWED_USER_EMAIL=local@example.com npx playwright test e2e/b026-synthetic-banner.spec.ts` 6/6 passed（auth-setup + 5 B026 specs 双 locale）；(d) GitHub Actions on c9274b5: Workbench Frontend CI run 26407849630 ✓ 3m20s + Python CI 26407849631 ✓ 1m55s + Workbench Deploy 26407983736 ✓ 2m03s（auto-trigger workflow_run，生产已上 c9274b5，与 Codex `/api/health.version` 验证一致）；(e) `git diff c5afc75..HEAD --name-only` 显示我变更的 9 个文件均未触碰 /execution/journal-history 或 /execution/position-diff（这两个 file 最后修改 5月22日，B024/B022 surface 期），所以 B026 代码不可能选择性破坏这两条路由的 build；(f) messages JSON parse 通过，namespace 双语就位（vitest parity guard 在 Codex 自己 L1 中也是绿的）。结论：三环境（Generator 本地 / Frontend CI / Deploy VM）与 Codex 本地一对三分歧 → Codex env 问题（最可能：stale .next 或 stale dev server on :3000，或 @next/swc-*/lightningcss-* 平台 native bin 未装）。生成 generator response 文档 docs/test-reports/B026-synthetic-data-banner-generator-response-2026-05-26.md 含 6 段证据 + 3 个假设根因 + 干净 env 重试步骤（lsof:3000 kill / rm -rf .next node_modules / npm ci / npx playwright install chromium / npm run build）。本轮不动产品代码；状态推 reverifying 请 Codex 在干净 env 复测；若仍红需 Codex 附 next build stderr full + node/npm/uname + node_modules/@next/swc-* 列表用于平台诊断。
session_notes.evaluator: 2026-05-25 B026 F002 first-round verification on HEAD `c9274b5` failed in L1. Production hash equivalence is already healthy (`/api/health.version == c9274b5...`), so no deploy issue this time. Backend and trade are fully green: backend pytest 241 passed 2 skipped + ruff + mypy; trade pytest 727 + mypy. Frontend static/unit gates partly green: lint, typecheck, vitest 165, npm audit, artifact grep, Playwright list count 38 all pass. Two hard blockers stop the batch: (1) `npm run build` fails with `PageNotFoundError: Cannot find module for page: /execution/journal-history` and `/execution/position-diff` during page-data collection even though the page files exist under `src/app/(protected)/execution/...`; (2) Playwright runtime broadly returns `Internal Server Error`, starting from anonymous `/login` and `/ -> /login`, then cascading into protected-route shell tests, old B025 bilingual tests, and the new B026 synthetic-banner tests. Error-context files confirm the rendered page body is literally `Internal Server Error`, so missing testids are downstream symptoms, not flaky selectors. Wrote blocker report `docs/test-reports/B026-synthetic-data-banner-blocker-2026-05-25.md`; status should return to `fixing` and L2 should not run.
